bets.audit: Edge existed. Rules followed. Model predicted 233.5 vs line 232.5.
Tatum OUT (Achilles, season-ending), Booker OUT. OVER thesis collapsed. Cashed out.
Model predicted 216.8, actual 217. Off by 0.2 points. Near-perfect prediction.
Warriors dominated. Total 245 blew past 225 line.
Mitchell, Mobley, Giannis, Harden all OUT/questionable. Deviation dropped below threshold. Cancelled at -$2 fee. OVER would have hit — lesson: missing stars ≠ lower total.

books.title: 围城 (Fortress Besieged)
books.author: 钱钟书
books.weapon: Marriage is a fortress — those outside want in, those inside want out. Applied: Don't chase trades you're not in.

books.title: 孙子兵法 (The Art of War)
books.author: 孙子
books.weapon: 先为不可胜 — Win first, then fight. Applied: Only bet when edge exists. Passing IS a move.

books.title: Thinking in Bets
books.author: Annie Duke
books.weapon: Process over outcome. Resulting is the enemy. Don't judge decisions by outcomes — judge by the quality of thinking that went into them.

strategy_evolution.rule: dev≥6 threshold + three-confirmation flow + tiered sizing ($15/$25)
16-cell Wilson CI filter: only 2 cells passed (10-15pt OVER <228, 15+ UNDER ≥228)
Simple: dev≥6 OVER $15 | dev≥10 UNDER $15 | line<212 blocked | $15 flat

rules: OVER: bet when model deviation ≥ 6 points ($15 flat)
UNDER: bet only when deviation ≥ 10 points ($15 flat)
No bet when market line < 212 (low-total protection)
Three-confirmation flow: night before → morning → 20min pre-game
3 consecutive losses → stop for the day
Post full audit for every bet — win or lose
One book per day → extract one rule → test it
Simple > Complex — V3 overfit proved this
